title: CC narrative review S15 panel a3

payload.notes: S15 is the 4th/final shot of beat B08 (S12-S15) and the whole-film character-arc turning point: the invariant is written back along the wiki edge, a verdict box says "re-run experiment with I-K3 enforced" / "[3] RE-RUN", and the executor accepts the lesson. STORY READ: narrative_beat_fidelity=3, composition_story=3 — softer than a2. The bake reads as a competent duo-in-wiki tableau but the two load-bearing payloads under-deliver vs a2: (a) the invariant-propagating-along-the-edge-to-ENFORCE-a-re-run cue is muted, so the verdict reads as a generic status rather than an enforced re-run, and (b) the executor's humbled, convergent turning point leans almost entirely on the forthcoming HTML caption instead of being legible from posture/expression. Reading order is workable and the central-to-upper safe zone stays reserved for the bilingual HTML text layer, but the resolution beat does not yet carry on its own. Visual identity-lock / artifact / safezone-cleanliness / stray-text are NOT my call — left to the visual reviewers (Gemini/Codex).
